hero.title: Solutions for Public Companies
hero.description: Comprehensive AI-powered investor relations and corporate communications solutions designed specifically for publicly traded companies.

features.title: SEC Filing Support
features.description: Automated assistance for 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K filings with AI-powered compliance checking and formatting.

features.title: Earnings Communications
features.description: Streamlined earnings call preparation, press release generation, and investor materials creation.

features.title: Analyst Relations
features.description: AI-powered sentiment tracking, analyst coverage management, and relationship optimization.

features.title: Market Intelligence
features.description: Real-time market sentiment analysis, competitor tracking, and investor behavior insights.

features.title: Regulatory Compliance
features.description: Automated compliance monitoring, disclosure management, and regulatory requirement tracking.

features.title: Crisis Management
features.description: Rapid response protocols, stakeholder communication, and reputation management during crises.

items.title: Regulatory Expertise
items.description: Built-in knowledge of SEC requirements, disclosure rules, and public company best practices.

items.title: Institutional-Grade Security
items.description: Enterprise security standards with SOC 2 compliance and data encryption at rest and in transit.

items.title: Scalable Infrastructure
items.description: Cloud-native platform that scales with your company's growth and communication needs.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Dedicated support team with public company IR expertise available around the clock.
